docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,180.80 FILED BY CHEVRON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE ELGIN MARCELLUS GOOLSBY TONY R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEVRON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE ELGIN MARCELLUS GOOLSBY TONY R. $2,180.80 PRINCIPAL, $59.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,240.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR CHEVRON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION ASSIGNED TO CO-OPERATIVE ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE ELGIN MARCELLUS GOOLSBY TONY R.
